prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan R series 2.0L inline-4 (R20A) with a custom billet crankshaft from Tomei, forged pistons by JE (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM reliability. Pair with a custom-built T04E Garrett turbocharger (56mm compressor, 62mm turbine) on a custom tubular manifold by HKS, flowing into a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a straight-pipe design terminating in a Fujitsubo GSpec Type RS muffler for optimal backpressure and sound.

Full standalone ECU conversion using a Haltech Elite 2500 with custom wiring harness by Painless Performance, integrated with a Motec C127 dash for real-time data logging. Fuel system upgrade includes a Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering. Ignition system features a set of NGK R7437-9 racing spark plugs gapped at 0.024" and a custom MSD Digital 6AL ignition box for precise timing control.

Suspension overhaul with a custom coilover setup by Tein Flex Z (CSP311-specific valving), paired with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars, and a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0115K, SPF0116K, SPF0117K). Braking system includes a Wilwood Dynalite front brake kit (4-piston calipers, 11-inch rotors) and a custom rear disc conversion using Nissan 300ZX (Z32) rear calipers and rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a rare Nissan Silvia CSP311-specific Rocket Bunny V1 kit (hand-laid carbon fiber, bolt-on fenders, and custom rear quarter panels), paired with a custom front lip and rear diffuser by Varis Japan. Paint scheme in Nissan’s original 1965 Silvia Blue (code: 407) with a custom pearlescent clear coat by PPG for depth.

Interior retrim with a full custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, bolt-in design), wrapped in Alcantara by Katzkin. Seats replaced with Bride Zeta III (CSP311-specific mounting brackets) in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel and a custom shift knob by AutoTecknic in machined aluminum.

Lighting upgrade to full LED conversion with custom Hella 500 Series headlights (CSP311-specific housings) and rear taillights from a Nissan Laurel C33 (JDM-spec, clear lens with smoked reflectors). Wheels are Work Meister S1 3P (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear) in silver with custom center caps featuring the original Silvia CSP311 emblem, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear).
